blocks.goal: Introduce a dedicated utility class to contain attribute-related rendering and validation helpers so Attribute can delegate non-state behavior.

ops.details:
Create a new utility class org.jsoup.nodes.AttributeUtil in the same package. Copy static helper implementations (rendering and key validation) from Attribute into AttributeUtil as static members so callers can use them via AttributeUtil. The new class should include required imports: org.jsoup.internal.StringUtil, org.jsoup.internal.QuietAppendable, org.jsoup.nodes.Document.OutputSettings, org.jsoup.internal.Normalizer, org.jsoup.internal.SharedConstants, org.jspecify.annotations.Nullable, java.util.regex.Pattern, java.util.Arrays, and any other types referenced by the moved code (Entities, Attributes). Implement the following static members in AttributeUtil (copied implementations): - private static final String[] booleanAttributes (copy contents) - private static final Pattern xmlKeyReplace - private static final Pattern htmlKeyReplace - public static String getValidKey(String key, Document.OutputSettings.Syntax syntax) - private static boolean isValidXmlKey(String key) - private static boolean isValidHtmlKey(String key) - static void html(String key, @Nullable String val, QuietAppendable accum, Document.OutputSettings out) - static void htmlNoValidate(String key, @Nullable String val, QuietAppendable accum, Document.OutputSettings out) - public static boolean isBooleanAttribute(final String key)

Do not modify Attribute.java in this step; only add the new file so the project can compile with both classes present.

blocks.goal: Move rendering and validation responsibilities out of Attribute into AttributeUtil and update Attribute to delegate, reducing the Attribute class size and improving cohesion.

ops.details: Move the three private static fields booleanAttributes, xmlKeyReplace, and htmlKeyReplace from Attribute into AttributeUtil. They are stateless data used by validation and boolean checks.

Move the listed static methods from Attribute into AttributeUtil (as static methods). Ensure moved methods reference the moved fields in AttributeUtil and preserve access modifiers (public/static/private as appropriate).

Update Attribute to delegate to AttributeUtil for moved functionality: - Replace internal calls to getValidKey(...) with AttributeUtil.getValidKey(...) - Replace calls to html(...) and htmlNoValidate(...) with AttributeUtil.html(...) and AttributeUtil.htmlNoValidate(...). Update shouldCollapseAttribute and other methods that call isBooleanAttribute(...) to call AttributeUtil.isBooleanAttribute(...). Remove the moved fields and methods from Attribute.java source. Add or update imports in Attribute.java to reference AttributeUtil if necessary. Keep behavior identical by delegating to AttributeUtil where previously logic existed in this class.

Add required imports to AttributeUtil.java (copied from Attribute where necessary). In Attribute.java, add import for org.jsoup.nodes.AttributeUtil if not in same package (it is in same package, so explicit import is optional) and ensure imports remain consistent for referenced types. Remove any now-unused imports in Attribute.java relating only to the moved code (e.g., Pattern if no longer used in Attribute).
